content:
ITEM 2. Properties
At [DATE_TIME], we owned or leased 125 offices in 78 countries around the world. Our corporate headquarters are located in owned and leased premises in [LOCATION].
In addition, we owned or leased a total of four global processing centers located in the [LOCATION], [LOCATION] and [LOCATION].
We believe that these facilities are suitable and adequate to support our ongoing business needs.
ITEM 3.
